title: Stéphane Nguyen
text: Home * People * Stéphane Nguyen Stéphane Nguyen [1] Stéphane Nguyen , a French computer chess programmer and author of the Java chess engine Jester [2] . Stéphane participated with Jester at multiple French Computer Chess Championships and French Programmers Tournaments , and maintained a Computer Chess Site, also reporting on the tournaments. External Links [ edit ] Ludochess.com - Stéphane Nguyen's Computer Chess Site (French) ( Wayback Machine ) References [ edit ] ↑ Stéphane Nguyen at FCCC 2002 , Image cropped from Massy, France - 5 & 6 Oct 2002 - 9ème Championnat Français de Programmes d'Echecs , Other pictures from Sylvain : Eric Marathée , Franck Zibi , Stéphane Nguyen ( Wayback Machine ) ↑ JESTER, the strongest pure java chess program ( Wayback Machine ) Up one level
